name: Baked Peanut Butter Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the corn syrup, sugar, vanilla extract, eggs, and peanut butter in a bowl until smooth.
2. Pour the mixture into the unbaked pie crust.
3. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 15 minutes.
4. Reduce the temperature to 350°F (175°C).
5. Continue baking for an additional 30-35 minutes or until the center is set and looks slightly wobbly. Allow the pie to cool before serving.
